violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the knife rack and vents have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing area and dry storage area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The wall in the dry storage area is in poor repair, hole observed in wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
